title: Vanity Fantasy 3D Weapons
description: This Mod ports the textures from the great CIT Texturpack from nongko into a Vanity Pack
body:
This mod ports the textures from the amazing [Fantasy 3D Weapons CIT Texturpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fantasy-3d-weapons-cit) by [nongko](https://modrinth.com/user/nongko) to the [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core) mod ## This mod **requires** [Ravens Vanity Tags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ravens-vanity-tags)! Credits:\ Textures and Models: [nongko](https://modrinth.com/user/nongko) \ Nearly made the whole other part of the project: [LuckCrafter](https://modrinth.com/user/LuckCrafter)\ Idea and analyzing the format of vanity packs: [Next Raven](https://modrinth.com/user/NextRaven)
Permission prove
![Image of the discord agreement to let me create this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11f3d3098c6c47af3c81016314808d010c4446a0.png)
If you want a new CIT pack to be ported to a vanity pack you can create an issue [here](https://github.com/NextRaven10/ravens-vanity-packs)! ### Do you need a quick and easy Minecraft server? Then WiseHosting is for you! [![WISEHOSTING Official Parnter! Use Code: NEXTRAVEN for 25% off your first Month](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff33c0ba9a4b1cb0032533813a6531d254b24137.png)](https://wisehosting.com/nextraven) Or click the link below and get 25% off your first Month: [https://wisehosting.com/nextraven/](https://wisehosting.com/nextraven/)
